entities.name: strategy-compounder
entities.context: Command-line tool for periodic strategy reviews that generates evolution reports, maps heat zones, assesses cohesion, and compares against baseline strategy

entities.name: Monthly Strategy Review
entities.context: End-of-month strategic review process using strategy-compounder tool

entities.name: GTM Hypotheses
entities.context: Go-to-market hypotheses stored in Knowledge/hypotheses/gtm_hypotheses.md, used as baseline for strategy comparison

entities.name: Heat Zones
entities.context: Strategic focus areas identified and mapped during strategy review

entities.name: Cohesion Assessment
entities.context: Evaluation of strategic alignment produced by strategy-compounder

relationships.context: Monthly review process executes strategy-compounder with month period flag
Tool takes GTM hypotheses as baseline input for diff comparison
Tool outputs heat zone mapping as part of analysis
Tool produces cohesion assessment as output
